title: ast: avoid intermediate wires/assigns when lowering to AST_MEMINIT

features.name: memory initialization via for loop in initial block
features.description: Code should include a memory declaration with for loop initialization in an initial block
features.snippet: reg [7:0] mem [0:255]; integer i; initial for (i = 0; i < 256; i++) mem[i] = 0;

features.name: unpacked memory array declaration
features.description: Code should include an unpacked memory array declaration with parameters for width and depth
